login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the workspace.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Check your email for a password reset link. It will expire in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid or missing reset token. Please request a new password reset link.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
